title: Newtonia nitida

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Newtonia nitida include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Newtonia nitida is commonly used in traditional medicine to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health ailments.
taxonomy: Newtonia nitida is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae.
